mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password, role, enabled, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, email, password, role, enabled, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, email, password, role, enabled, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, username, email, password, role, enabled, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = #{username})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = #{email})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password, role, enabled, failed_login_attempts, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{role, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{enabled}, #{failedLoginAttempts}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, email = #{email}, role = #{role, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET failed_login_attempts = failed_login_attempts + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = #{username}
UPDATE users SET locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = #{username}
UPDATE users SET failed_login_attempts = 0, locked_until = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = #{username}
